transcript: Me? [laughing] Who is this? [laughing] Dude... who is this?
My fist'll tell ya. How's that sound?
Bracket, you sum'bitch. You wanna meet up with my whip pretty quick?
I'm gettin' real mad and DJ is gonna beat your ass, man. You... what? [voice in background]
You gonna meet up with my clamp.
Okay. Bracket... Where do we know you from, Bracket?
Well, you're gonna know my fists pretty well, pretty-- [beep] --quick.
'[looped]' [laughter] Who is... [laughter] Who is this moron? What the hell are you talking about? Why don't you speak in English, moron?
You're the one calling, moron. I don't even know who you are. I know your name ain't Bracket.
[to someone in background] Oh, hold on, hold on, hold on. Hello? ...Bracket?
Okay, I will. But when you wanna tell us your name, then call back, Mr. Bracket. Okay?
Ready to meet up with my boot?
Yeah. yeah. Where? Where? Well, come on! Come on!
You ready to meet up with my heel?
[laughing] '[looped]' Man, quit asking me if I'm ready. Man, quit asking me if I'm ready. If you're gonna do it, do it. If not, shut up.
Yeah... why don't you... Why don't you tell me where, man?
If you wanna go at it, then-- '[beep]' --tell me where. If not, shut up.
I don't... I don't beat up children.
I'm gonna give you a taste of my boot pretty--
Well, okay, okay. Well then, when you give me a taste of your boot, then I'll be waiting.
You'll meet up with my pipe.
There he goes, he's gonna meet up with his pipes now.
'Cause you're gonna meet up with my foot.
Oh, God. Do you have a purpose?
To give you a taste of my clamp.
Okay, well then, let's do that. Okay? Why don't you give me a taste of whatever you wanna do. Your foot, your clamps, your fist, but do it.
You know where After the Gold Rush is?
Why don't you go there this Tuesday?
And put... and put... And put some fists upside my head. Why don't you do that?
I'll level your ass with my whip.
Why don't you come do it?
'Cause you're so... 'Cause you're too afraid. I don't beat up kids.
When you become a man, then I'll level you with my whip.
'[sampled]' I'm trying to fix this cuckoo clock.
